steps.title: Move from general to detail
steps.content: The first sentence makes a general claim about Leo Carver's intricate costume design. The second sentence points to the blue rhinestones as a specific feature that shows his careful attention to detail.

steps.title: Reject time and contrast
steps.content: A and C signal time sequence, but the rhinestones are not a later event. D signals contrast, but the rhinestones support the claim about Carver's talent instead of opposing it. The answer is B.
